message:
chore(gitignore): add _target_*/ and _target-*/ patterns for per-agent cargo build directories

Multiple concurrent agents create isolated cargo target directories with
an underscore prefix (e.g. _target_opus_main/, _target_topaz/,
_target_topazfalcon/, _target_codex_topaz2/) to avoid build lock
contention. The existing target_*/ pattern only matches directories
without the leading underscore, so these were showing up as untracked
files in git status and causing ru sync to flag the repo as dirty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,8 @@ tmp_*/
 # Per-agent cargo target directories
 .target-*/
 .target_*/
+_target_*/
+_target-*/
 
 # Session export snapshots
 pi-session-*.html
